primary_catalyst.description: President Trump signed Section 232 Presidential Proclamation imposing 25% tariff on advanced AI chips (NVDA H200, AMD MI325X), effective 12:01am EST Jan 15. Announcement intraday Jan 14 drove NVDA and AMD lower.

secondary_catalysts.description: Axios reporting: 25% tariff specifically hits NVDA's top export SKUs
CNN Business: 'Trump enacts 25% tariff on chips â€” with a caveat' (data center/domestic-use exemptions)

force_attributions.rationale: US industrial policy (Section 232) directly targets NVDA flagship AI chips to force reshoring
Creates new export-control-like structure for China-bound H200 shipments
TSMC outbound logistics complexity increases; foundry chain pressure

notes: Move was muted (-1.44%) because of broad data-center exemption carve-outs in the proclamation text. Full impact absorbed over Jan 15-20 as enforcement details clarified.
